MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Jan-04-2022 Off Calendar

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Set For Trial On Feb-14-22 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via CourtCall:
Timothy C. Pieper of POND NORTH LLP (213-617-6170), appearing for defendant FMC Corporation;
Lisa Passalacqua of WILSON ELSER MOSKOWITZ EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (415-433-0990), appearing for defendant Bragg Investment Company, Inc.
Jennifer A. Cormier of MANNING, GROSS + MASSENBURG LLP (415) 512-4381, appearing for defendant The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company;
Randall K. Bernard of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3200) appearing for defendant Triple A Machine Shop, Inc.

Ruling:
Not contested and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial, and Extending Discovery Cutoff is GRANTED under Code Civil Procedure section 36(a). Plaintiffs have shown that Robert Collins' health is such that a preference is necessary to prevent prejudicing his interest in the litigation. Conditional non-opposition filed by The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company. Conditional opposition filed by FMC Corporation.

The trial date is February 14, 2022 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is February 25, 2022. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court.

The last day for hearing summary judgment/adjudication motions is February 10, 2022. Summary judgment/adjudication motions shall be brought on regular notice pursuant to the relevant provisions of the C.C.P., unless the parties stipulate otherwise. The Court will allow a maximum of four summary judgment/adjudication motions per day to be calendared in this action. Before a party files and serves such motion, it must contact the Court's Calendar Clerk to make a reservation. Time to respond to written discovery that has not yet been served is shortened to 20 days. For written discovery that has already been served, responses are due within 20 days of this hearing or by the date determined by the C.C.P., whichever is earlier. If there is any kind of issue/dispute that requires meet and confer, such meet and confer shall not be made via email or letter. It shall occur in person or via telephone. Electronic service is considered the equivalent of personal service. Fact discovery cut-off date is January 28, 2022. Expert discovery cut-off date is February 11, 2022. All bankruptcy documents shall be turned over to defendants no later than November 26, 2021. If Plaintiffs submit documents to bankruptcy trusts after this date, they must notify defendants of this no later than five days after submission. The fact discovery cut-off does not apply to bankruptcy documents.
